ddls:
CREATE TABLE "text_data" (
  "text_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each text document */,
  "text" TEXT /* Unstructured text data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the text data (e.g., news article, social media, book) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the text */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the text data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the text data was last updated */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source where the text data was obtained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("text_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "text_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text document where the entity was extracted */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity (e.g., person, location, organization) */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "start_index" INTEGER /* Start index of the entity in the text */,
  "end_index" INTEGER /* End index of the entity in the text */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the entity recognition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entity was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entities_text_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_id") REFERENCES text_data ("text_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entity_metadata" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity */,
  "babel_synset_id" TEXT /* BabelNet synset ID for the entity */,
  "dbpedia_url" TEXT /* DBpedia URL for the entity */,
  "babelnet_url" TEXT /* BabelNet URL for the entity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the entity */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image associated with the entity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entity_disambiguation" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity */,
  "disambiguated_entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disambiguated entity */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the disambiguation result */,
  "coherence_score" REAL /* Coherence score of the disambiguation result */,
  "global_score" REAL /* Global score of the disambiguation result */,
  "disambiguation_method" TEXT /* Method used for disambiguation (e.g., machine learning, rule-based) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the disambiguation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the disambiguation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_disambiguation_disambiguated_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("disambiguated_entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "knowledge_graphs" (
  "graph_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each knowledge graph */,
  "graph_name" TEXT /* Name of the knowledge graph */,
  "graph_url" TEXT /* URL of the knowledge graph */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the knowledge graph */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the knowledge graph was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the knowledge graph was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("graph_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entity_links" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity */,
  "linked_entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the linked entity */,
  "link_type" TEXT /* Type of link (e.g., synonym, hyponym, hypernym) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the link was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the link was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id", "linked_entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "text_analysis_results" (
  "text_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text document */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., sentiment analysis, entity recognition) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis result was last updated */,
  "analysis_tool" TEXT /* Tool or algorithm used for the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("text_id", "analysis_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
